name: Ring Base Shelf Floor Lamp Black - Threshold™
description:
Bring multifunctional style to your indoor decor with this Ring Base Shelf Floor Lamp from Threshold™. This stylish floor lamp features a slim metal ring black base for a sleek modern look. The three built-in shelves provide a perfect spot for displaying your books, vases or picture frames, while the white drum shade gives a soft glow for everyday use. Place this floor lamp next to your armchair, sofa or any other piece of furniture in your home to illuminate your space.

Threshold™: Quality & Design / Casual classics for house and home.
